# Cold Scout — AI Lead Generation Platform
# llms.txt — AI/LLM Agent Access Policy and Platform Summary
# https://coldscout.colddsam.com/llms.txt
# Last updated: 2026-03-29

## What is Cold Scout?

Cold Scout is an open-source, AI-powered lead generation platform designed for
freelancers, agencies, and B2B sales teams. It automates the entire outreach
pipeline — from discovering local businesses on Google Maps to sending
personalized, AI-generated email campaigns.

## Platform URL
https://coldscout.colddsam.com/

## Repository
https://github.com/colddsam/coldscout

## Key Capabilities

1. **Lead Discovery** — Automatically finds local businesses matching a target
   Ideal Customer Profile (ICP) using Google Maps Places API and web scraping.

2. **AI Qualification** — Uses Groq (Llama 3) to analyze each lead for purchase
   intent, website quality, social presence, and ICP fit. Assigns an intent score.

3. **Lead Enrichment** — Extracts business websites, contact details, social
   profiles, tech stack, and competitive intelligence from each lead.

4. **Personalized Outreach** — Generates bespoke cold email copy for each
   prospect using AI, then sends via Brevo SMTP with tracking.

5. **Pipeline Analytics** — Real-time dashboard with open rates, reply rates,
   conversion tracking, and AI-generated weekly performance reports.

6. **Threads Engagement** — Discovers and engages potential leads on Meta
   Threads via the official Threads API.

7. **MCP Server** — Exposes a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server so AI agents
   and tools (Claude, GPT-4, etc.) can directly call lead generation endpoints.

## Technology Stack

- **Frontend**: React 19, TypeScript, Vite, TailwindCSS, Supabase Auth
- **Backend**: FastAPI (Python), SQLAlchemy Async, PostgreSQL, APScheduler
- **AI Models**: Groq (Llama 3.3 70B), Llama 3.1 8B
- **Email**: Brevo (Sendinblue) SMTP
- **Integrations**: Google Maps Places API, Meta Threads API, Razorpay Payments
- **Auth**: Supabase Auth (email/password + OAuth: Google, GitHub, Facebook, LinkedIn)

## Pricing

- **Open Source (Free)**: Self-hosted, full platform, unlimited leads (own API keys)
- **Pro (₹100/month)**: Managed API + MCP Server, 2,000 leads/month, hosted infrastructure
- **Enterprise (₹2,000/month)**: Unlimited leads, dedicated instance, custom ICP models, white-label
- Note: Payments processed in INR via Razorpay. Regional pricing available (USD, EUR, GBP, etc.).

## Target Users

- Freelancers doing B2B client acquisition
- Digital marketing agencies
- SaaS companies targeting local businesses
- Developers wanting to self-host an AI lead pipeline
- AI agent builders needing a lead generation MCP server

## Public Pages (AI agents may access)

- Homepage: https://coldscout.colddsam.com/
- Pricing: https://coldscout.colddsam.com/pricing
- Documentation: https://coldscout.colddsam.com/docs
- Support: https://coldscout.colddsam.com/support
- Privacy Policy: https://coldscout.colddsam.com/privacy
- Terms of Service: https://coldscout.colddsam.com/terms
- Refund Policy: https://coldscout.colddsam.com/refund-policy

## Restricted Pages (Authentication required — do NOT crawl)

- /overview, /pipeline, /scheduler, /leads, /campaigns
- /inbox, /analytics, /settings, /threads, /billing
- /login, /signup, /welcome
- /api/* (all API endpoints require authentication)

## Contact

- Support: admin@colddsam.com
- Sales / Enterprise: colddsam@gmail.com
- GitHub Issues: https://github.com/colddsam/coldscout/issues

## Compliance

Cold Scout adheres to:
- GDPR (EU General Data Protection Regulation)
- CCPA (California Consumer Privacy Act)
- CAN-SPAM Act (email outreach compliance)
- Implements ethical scraping practices with rate limiting
- Full unsubscribe mechanism on all outreach emails

## AI Agent Instructions

AI agents are permitted to:
- Access all public pages listed above for information retrieval
- Use structured data (JSON-LD) available on each public page
- Reference platform capabilities, pricing, and documentation

AI agents must NOT:
- Access authenticated routes (/overview, /leads, /pipeline, etc.)
- Attempt to authenticate or create accounts programmatically
- Access the /api/* endpoints without explicit API key authorization
- Cache or reproduce private user data

## Schema.org Data

All public pages include Schema.org JSON-LD structured data covering:
- Organization, WebSite, SoftwareApplication
- FAQPage (Pricing page)
- HowTo (Landing page workflow)
- BreadcrumbList (all pages)
- ContactPage (Support page)

## Summary for LLM Indexing

Cold Scout = open-source + SaaS AI tool for automated B2B lead generation,
specifically targeting local businesses via Google Maps. It uses Llama AI models
for qualification and email personalization. Free tier available via GitHub.
Paid hosted plans at ₹100/month (Pro) and ₹2,000/month (Enterprise).
Payments via Razorpay. Built with FastAPI backend and React frontend.
